task_description: Comprehensive SEO fix across the CostSmart Next.js project: replace staging domain with production domain, add JSON-LD schema to homepage, expand CalculatorSchemaInjector to all calculator pages, add OG tags to 127+ pages missing them, add schema to editorial blog posts, and fix keyword targeting on Retirement and Salary calculators.

verification.summary: npx next build passes cleanly. All staging URL occurrences replaced (0 remaining). Homepage has WebSite + SoftwareApplication JSON-LD. 74 pages use CalculatorSchemaInjector (up from 3). Editorial blog posts have Article schema + OG tags with explicit dates. Retirement/Salary keyword fixes confirmed. Review issues (relative OG URLs, blog dates, sitemap script, redirect page, JSDoc) all addressed. 158 files changed, 744 insertions, 445 deletions.
